name: Meaning and Depth
summary: A path for people who want inward clarity, wisdom, emotional understanding, consciousness, meditation, music, and philosophical coherence.
thesis: Develop inner awareness, interpretive depth, and a stronger sense of meaning.
fitSignals: Wants to understand consciousness, emotion, and self-knowledge
Is drawn to meditation, philosophy, and contemplative practice
Likes meaning, ethics, and long-form reflection
Values coherence and emotional intelligence as much as facts

defaults.reviewRhythm: Short reflective sessions with occasional deeper synthesis blocks
defaults.milestoneTemplate: Build a coherent inward model using {coreSubject}, {supportingTopic}, and the {role} lens

weeklyCadencePresets.gentle: 3 short sessions and one reflection block per week
weeklyCadencePresets.balanced: 4 sessions per week with one synthesis session
weeklyCadencePresets.ambitious: 5 sessions per week with recurring note review
